candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line and wrong section.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Cash flow ending cash reconciles to cash balances, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.
Operating cash flow, not cash balance.
Investing cash flow, not cash balance.
Financing cash flow, not cash balance.
Interest paid, not cash and equivalents.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash line as preferred.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Single non-current liability component, not total current liabilities.
Balancing line and wrong section.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean short-term debt/current maturities line; excludes leases based on label.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing within 1 Year
candidates.why: Also a valid short-term debt/current maturities label, but appears to overlap conceptually with Current Portion of LT Debt.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of LT Debt/Capital Leases
candidates.why: Includes capital leases, which should be excluded in the baseline STD definition.

candidates.row_label: Long Term Debt Maturing in Year 2
candidates.why: Not due within one year.

candidates.row_label: Current maturities on long term receivables
candidates.why: Receivables are assets, not debt.

variables.notes: Chose the clean non-lease current debt label outside/alongside the shortlist. Did not select lease-inclusive or overlapping maturity labels to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Deferred tax is non-current tax accounting balance, not taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.
Broad payables/accruals bucket; not specific enough for taxes payable.
Could contain taxes, but not explicitly taxes payable.

variables.notes: No explicit taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable line is identifiable on the provided balance sheet.

candidates.why: Direct match to property, plant and equipment; net PPE is preferred when total PPE is not clearly available.
Gross PPE line exists, but values are blank in preview; net PPE is cleaner and reported.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depr/Imp Other Tangible Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation line, not PPE itself.
Investment property is distinct from PPE under IFRS.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit net PPE line outside the shortlist; this is the best reported PPE measure here.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.
Accounting equal total, but not the target assets label when Total Assets is available.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.why: Direct net cash flow from operating activities line.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final operating cash flow measure.

variables.notes: Selected the final operating cash flow line rather than the before-working-capital subtotal.
